mapper.insert: INSERT INTO shopping_list_items (household_id, inventory_item_id, is_manual, purchased, purchased_quantity, added_at) VALUES (#{householdId}, #{inventoryItemId}, #{isManual}, #{purchased}, #{purchasedQuantity}, #{addedAt})
mapper.select:
SELECT sli.id, sli.household_id, sli.inventory_item_id, sli.is_manual, sli.purchased, sli.purchased_quantity, sli.added_at, i.name AS name FROM shopping_list_items sli JOIN inventory_items i ON i.id = sli.inventory_item_id JOIN zaiko_categories c ON c.id = i.category_id LEFT JOIN stores st ON st.id = i.store_id WHERE sli.household_id = #{householdId}
ORDER BY c.name, i.name
ORDER BY st.name, i.name
ORDER BY i.name
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM shopping_list_items WHERE inventory_item_id = #{inventoryItemId} AND is_manual = #{isManual}
